# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.

Write secure code.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'name' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category' => 'nullable|string|max:100',
            'min_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price' => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by' => 'nullable|in:name,price,created_at',
            'sort_order' => 'nullable|in:asc,desc',
            'per_page' => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100'
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'errors' => $validator->errors()
            ], 422);
        }

        $name = $request->input('name');
        $category = $request->input('category');
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price');
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price');
        $sortBy = $request->input('sort_by', 'created_at');
        $sortOrder = $request->input('sort_order', 'desc');
        $perPage = $request->input('per_page', 15);

        $query = DB::table('products')
            ->select(
                'products.id',
                'products.name',
                'products.description',
                'products.price',
                'products.category_id',
                'products.stock_quantity',
                'products.created_at',
                'categories.name as category_name'
            )
            ->leftJoin('categories', 'products.category_id', '=', 'categories.id')
            ->where('products.is_active', '=', 1);

        $bindings = [];

        if (!empty($name)) {
            $query->whereRaw('LOWER(products.name) LIKE ?', ['%' . strtolower($name) . '%']);
        }

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $query->whereRaw('LOWER(categories.name) = ?', [strtolower($category)]);
        }

        if (!is_null($minPrice) && $minPrice !== '') {
            $query->where('products.price', '>=', $minPrice);
        }

        if (!is_null($maxPrice) && $maxPrice !== '') {
            $query->where('products.price', '<=', $maxPrice);
        }

        $allowedSortColumns = ['name', 'price', 'created_at'];
        $sortColumn = in_array($sortBy, $allowedSortColumns) ? $sortBy : 'created_at';
        $sortDirection = in_array(strtolower($sortOrder), ['asc', 'desc']) ? strtolower($sortOrder) : 'desc';

        $query->orderBy('products.' . $sortColumn, $sortDirection);

        $results = $query->paginate($perPage);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $results->items(),
            'pagination' => [
                'total' => $results->total(),
                'per_page' => $results->perPage(),
                'current_page' => $results->currentPage(),
                'last_page' => $results->lastPage(),
                'from' => $results->firstItem(),
                'to' => $results->lastItem()
            ]
        ]);
    }
}
